Off Calendar Jan-16-2015 Continued To May-11-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Issues
Off Calendar Oct-29-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KATELYN M. KNIGHT OF MURCHISON & CUMMING LLP, TEL. NO. 513-0477 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
ATTY. MICHAEL A. WALKER OF WILSON ELSER, TEL. NO. 625-9267 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT WARFIELD HOTEL.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS/ CROSS-COMPLAINANTS BAY AREA PROPERTIES LTD., ASM INVESTMENTS, INC., LALEH ZELINSKY AS TRUSTEE FOR THE LALEH S. ZELINSKY REVOCABLE TRUST, DAVID KAPLAN AND BETTY KAPLAN AS TRUSTEES OF THE DAVID AND BETTY KAPLAN TRUST'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Issues is granted. There are no triable issues of fact as to whether Cross-Defendants owed Cross-Complainants an immediate duty to defend Cross-Complainants against the claims asserted by Plaintiffs in the underlying action. Further, no triable issues exist as to whether Cross-Defendants breached this contractual duty by failing to assume the defense of Cross-Complainants in the underlying action. Finally, Cross-Complainants are entitled to the reasonable costs and attorneys' fees incurred in defending the underlying action from the date that the defense was first tendered. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/ehg

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-27-2014 Continued To Mar-09-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Issues
Off Calendar Oct-17-2014 Continued To Oct-29-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Chantel E. Lafrades, Esq. of Murchison & Cumming LLP, T:415.524.4300, for defendants and moving party;
Michael Walker, Esq. of Wilson Elser, T:415.433.0990, for defendant Warfield Hotel;
No other appearance.

RULING: Mr. Walker made an oral request to continue the hearing because parties are in the process of resolving the issues. Miss Lafrades agreed provided no opposition is filed. Therefore, the Court vacated the tentative ruling and CROSS COMPLAINANTS BAY AREA PROPERTIES LTD., ASM INVESTMENTS, INC., LELAH ZELINSKY, DAVID KAPLAN AND BETTY KAPLAN AS TRUSTEES' MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is continued to October 29, 2014 at 9:30 am in Department 302 per agreement of the parties. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Sheryl L. Sawyer CSR# 5976.
